response:
Lisa’s March onboarding feedback email reports that the March cohort’s overall satisfaction fell to 7.2/10 from 8.1, highlighting strong positives (a 9.1/10-rated buddy system and on-time IT setup) and critical issues: 5 out of 8 members were confused about benefits deadlines, tools access took 3–5 days (vs. the 1-day target), and no culture handbooks were provided.
The feedback’s top-priority action item is to address the delayed tools access to meet the required 1-day turnaround goal.
